message:
data(audit): peer-review LimitedWriter, transport dispatch, cross-cutting error analysis

LimitedWriter streaming limit correct (bounded overshoot). Transport
dispatch immediate-cancel semantics correct. GenServer try_* Cancelled
path is dead code (try_send never produces Cancelled).

Session total: 295 files, 42 commits reviewed. 12 bugs fixed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
